_doc.purpose: Localization companion for dictionary_UI.json. Holds en-us entries added/updated after the source file's zh-cn text was authored, so the source file itself doesn't need to be touched again for translation-only changes.
_doc.addTrade_note: zh-cn source added the (batch-lot procurement) qualifier and a <link=...> tooltip wrapper. The stale 'Add Trade' / unwrapped tooltip en-us entries were removed from dictionary_UI.json and replaced here. Kept parallel wording with the sibling ui_management_production_retailTrade (still untranslated) so both read consistently once that one is done.
_doc.roomTooltip_note: zh-cn source added a trailing $roomActivityState$ line. The stale (5-line) en-us entry was removed from dictionary_UI.json and replaced here with the 6-line version.

en-us.ui_map_roomTooltip:
Room: $room$
$furnitures$
Items: $items$
Characters: $names$
Travel time $time$ min
$roomActivityState$
en-us.ui_management_production_addTrade_toolti:
Trade orders charge different currencies depending on which faction you're trading with.
Wholesale orders settle at the end of each day, with no purchase limit.
en-us.charaDetail_panel_knowledges_tooltips: Lists all of this character's knowledge
en-us.ui_management_production_retailTrade_too:
Trade orders charge different currencies depending on which faction you're trading with.
Retail orders settle immediately on purchase confirmation, but have a daily purchase cap (resets each day).
en-us.ui_management_production_retailTrade_non: No orders need to be settled
en-us.ui_management_production_retailTrade_can: Cannot complete the deal due to missing specific items
en-us.ui_debug_tooltip:
When this option is enabled,
1. Additional data that shouldn't normally be shown is displayed (for debugging convenience)
2. The player can sleep at any time
3. Player-executed commands don't consume Stamina or Energy
4. Combat can be ended instantly with a chosen outcome
5. Prisoners cannot refuse any command
6. Conversations will always pick a chat topic
%%ui_debug_tooltip2%%
en-us.ui_entry_traits_tooltip: Character traits. Significantly affects the character's %%ui_entry_derivedStats%%.
en-us.management_faction_activeHours_tooltip:
Can also be thought of as the day/night split.
Characters treat the start of the active hours as the morning of a new day, and schedule their routine and sleep around that.
NPC sandbox behavior may also be affected by the day/night distinction.
If set to 24-hour active, characters default to treating 6 AM as morning when scheduling their day.
en-us.management_faction_mealHours_tooltip:
During this time window, NPCs will head to the dining room to eat.
For non-player factions, meal times are fixed.
For the player faction, meal times can be adjusted, but there must be meals in the inventory, and the 【%%com_furniture_mealPrep_displayName%%】 command must be scheduled on the 【%%ui_management_tab_jobs%%】 page before NPCs will start eating.
